contents.text: The school nurse takes care of their team using traditional and aggressive means.
Tally the number of people affected by your ice packs. When this number reaches 8, instantly replenish 1 ice pack.

tooltip.text:
Cost - 650 Siege Bucks
Restarts a teammate's heartbeat, rapidly healing them over 3s.
Must be used on an ally below 10 HP.
Can be used every 25s.
Cooldown reduced to 15s if missed, and 5s if used on an ally at or above 10 HP.

Cost - 550 Siege Bucks
A pair of shoes that light up and change colors.
Provides a slight increase to protection, armor, and movement speed.
Provides glowing to enemies in a 10 block radius around you.

Cost - 250 Siege Bucks
A health pack that can be picked up by teammates, restoring 4 HP.
Takes 3s to arm itself before teammates can use it.

Cost - 700 Siege Bucks
Item that can be passed to the closest teammate by throwing the item.
When held, grants a large speed boost, but lowers your armor.
Buffs activate if the inhaler is the only item being held.

Cost - 650 Siege Bucks
Deals slightly more damage than your thermometer.
Additionally inflicts Bleed I on enemies for 3s.
Additional hits refresh this bleed effect.

Cost - 400 Siege Bucks
Injects a weak virus into a teammate, inflicting slowness, weakness, and nausea for 4s.
After the debuffs expire, the teammate becomes immune to them as well as armor reduction for the rest of the current life.
Has a max range of 2 blocks.

Cost - 2000 Siege Bucks
Reduces the player requirement for the passive from 8 to 6.
Returns you to the main menu.
